name: Public Joint-Stock Company Interregional Distribution Grid Company of the North-West
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company Interregional Distribution Grid Company of the North-West, together with its subsidiaries owns and operates electric power transmission and distribution grids in the North-Western region of Russia. The company operates 177.1 thousand kilometers (km) of overhead transmission lines; 176,064 thousand km of cable power lines; and 35KV substations. It also operates and develops power metering system services.The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Saint Petersburg, Russia. Public Joint-Stock Company Interregional Distribution Grid Company of the North-West is a subsidiary of Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company.
